    Policy Research

    KFF’s policy research provides facts and analysis on a wide range of policy issues and public programs. 

    Explore all Policy Research
  • Polling

    Polling

    KFF designs, conducts and analyzes original public opinion and survey research on Americans’ attitudes, knowledge, and experiences with the health care system to help amplify the public’s voice in major national debates.

    View all Poll Findings
  • Health News

    Health News

    KFF Health News is a national newsroom that produces in-depth journalism about health issues and is one of the organization’s core operating programs.

    Explore KFF Health News

Home State Health Facts Health Status

Health Status

This category provides information on the health of the population in each state. It includes data on births, deaths, immunizations, obesity, smoking, and various illnesses and diseases, including influenza, cancer, diabetes, and heart disease. Data and information related to mental health and substance use disorder can be found in the Mental Health & Substance Use category; data and information on HIV/AIDS can be found in the HIV/AIDS category.

Select an indicator below to view state data. Results will be shown as a table, map, or trend graph, as available. To compile data from multiple indicators for one or more states, build a Custom State Report.

Refine Results

categories& subcategories

Health Status Indicators

Births

  • Total Number of Births
  • Births per 1,000 Women Ages 15-44
  • Births by Race/Ethnicity
  • Births by Detailed Hispanic Origin of Mother
  • Teen Birth Rate per 1,000 Women Ages 15-19
  • Preterm Births by Race/Ethnicity
  • Preterm Births as a Percent of All Births by Race/Ethnicity
  • Births of Low Birthweight by Race/Ethnicity
  • Births of Low Birthweight as a Percent of All Births by Race/Ethnicity
  • Births by Source of Payment for Delivery

Deaths

  • Total Deaths and Death Rates per 100,000 Population
  • Total Deaths and Death Rates per 100,000 Population by Sex
  • Total Deaths and Death Rates per 100,000 Population by Race/Ethnicity

Infant Deaths

  • Total Infant Deaths
  • Total Infant Deaths by Race/Ethnicity

Maternal Deaths

  • Maternal Deaths and Mortality Rates per 100,000 Live Births

Child and Teen Deaths

  • Child and Teen Deaths and Death Rates per 100,000 Population

Life Expectancy

  • Life Expectancy at Birth (in years)
  • Life Expectancy at Birth by Sex (in years)

Self-Reported Health Status

  • Adult Self-Reported Health Status
  • Adults Who Report Fair or Poor Health Status by Sex
  • Adults Who Report Fair or Poor Health Status by Race/Ethnicity
  • Men Who Report Fair or Poor Health Status, by Race/Ethnicity
  • Women Who Report Fair or Poor Health Status by Race/Ethnicity

SSDI/SSI Beneficiaries

  • Total SSDI Beneficiaries and SSI Beneficiaries, Under Age 65
  • Total SSDI Beneficiaries and SSI Beneficiaries as a Percent of Population Under Age 65
  • Age Distribution of Disabled Workers Under 65 in the SSDI Program
  • Age and Sex Distribution of Disabled Workers Under 65 in the SSDI Program
  • Distribution of SSI Beneficiaries by Age
  • Average Monthly Benefits for SSDI and SSI Beneficiaries
  • Distribution of SSDI Beneficiaries by Diagnostic Group
  • Distribution of SSI Beneficiaries Under 65 by Diagnostic Group

Chronic Conditions

  • Adults Ages 18-64 Who Report Having Chronic Conditions

Smoking

  • Adults Who Report Smoking by Sex
  • Adults Who Report Smoking by Race/Ethnicity
  • Women Who Report Smoking and Smoking Cessation During Pregnancy
  • State Medicaid Program Coverage of Tobacco Dependence Treatments by Type of Coverage
  • State Smoking Restrictions for Worksites, Restaurants, and Bars
  • Adolescents Reporting Cigarette and Tobacco Product Use in the Past Month
  • Adolescents Reporting Nicotine Vaping in the Past Month

Children

  • Percent of Children (ages 1-17) with Oral Health Problems
  • Percent of Children Who Were Ever Breastfed
  • Weight Status of Children Ages 6-17
  • Weekly Physical Activity Among Children Ages 6-17 Years
  • Percent of Children with Special Health Care Needs
  • Percent of Children Regularly Bullied in Past 12 Months
  • Percent of Children (Ages 3 to 17) with ADD/ADHD
  • Percent of Children Living in Household with Smoker(s)
  • Food Insufficiency among Children

Child Vaccines

  • Vaccination Coverage Among Children Age 35 Months
  • Vaccination Coverage Among Children Age 24 Months by Race/Ethnicity
  • Child Flu Vaccination Rates by Age
  • Hepatitis B Vaccination Coverage Among Children
  • MMR Vaccination Coverage Among Children
  • DTaP Vaccination Coverage Among Children
  • Vaccination Coverage Rates among Kindergartners
  • Vaccination Exemption Rates Among Kindergartners

State Vaccine Policies

  • State Vaccine Requirements for Children
  • State Requirements for Private Insurance Coverage of Vaccines
